responsibilities: Design, test, and refine prompt templates that maximize accuracy, consistency, and safety of LLM outputs
Develop systematic prompt evaluation frameworks to benchmark performance across model versions and use cases
Build prompt chains and multi-step reasoning workflows to solve complex, multi-stage business problems
Collaborate with product teams to translate user requirements into effective conversational and task-based prompts
Conduct A/B tests on prompt variations to quantify impact on output quality, latency, and user satisfaction
Identify and mitigate prompt injection vulnerabilities and edge cases that produce unsafe or incorrect outputs
Document prompt design patterns and best practices to scale prompt engineering knowledge across teams
Analyze model failure cases and iterate on prompts or few-shot examples to close performance gaps
Partner with engineers to integrate optimized prompts into production APIs and customer-facing applications
Stay current with prompting research and techniques such as chain-of-thought and tree-of-thought reasoning
